name: TDD
description_en: Test-driven development. Use when building features or fixing bugs test-first, when red-green is mentioned, or when you want integration tests.
description_zh: 测试驱动开发。适用于以测试先行的方式构建功能或修复 bug、提到红-绿循环、或希望编写集成测试时。
long_en: One skill from Matt Pocock's skills collection (this entry installs only the skills/engineering/tdd folder, not the whole repo). As of v1.1 it is a reference for the red → green loop — refactoring is left to the code-review skill — rather than a step-by-step workflow: it defines what a good test is (behavior through public interfaces, not implementation details), introduces the 'seam' as where tests go (test only at pre-agreed seams, confirmed with you before any test is written), and catalogs anti-patterns including implementation-coupled and tautological tests, favoring integration-style tests built as vertical 'tracer bullet' slices.
long_zh: Matt Pocock 技能合集中的一个技能（本条目只安装 skills/engineering/tdd 这一个目录，而非整仓）。自 v1.1 起，它是「红 → 绿」循环的参考资料（重构交给 code-review 技能），而非一步步的工作流：定义什么是好测试（通过公共接口验证行为、而非耦合实现细节）、引入「接缝(seam)」作为测试落点（只在事先约定、并在写任何测试前与你确认的接缝处测试），并罗列各类反模式（包括耦合实现的测试与同义反复(tautological)测试），偏好以纵向「曳光弹」切片构建的集成式测试。
sec_note_en: This skill writes and runs tests against your codebase using your project's existing test framework and task runner, so it executes code locally. It reads CONTEXT.md and ADRs (if present) to align vocabulary but does not transmit anything externally; risk is limited to local test execution.
sec_note_zh: 该技能会基于你项目现有的测试框架和任务运行器编写并运行针对代码库的测试，因此会在本地执行代码。它会读取 CONTEXT.md 和 ADR（若存在）以对齐术语，但不会向外部传输任何内容；风险仅限于本地测试执行。
